intro.speaker: antagonist
intro.text: You're walking the wrong street tonight, friend.

intro.speaker: player
intro.text: I don't have time for this.

partial.speaker: player
partial.text: Whoa, take it easy. I'm just passing through.

fail.speaker: antagonist
fail.text: Too slow to speak, too slow to fight.

intro.speaker: antagonist
intro.text: Look who decided to show up. Empty your pockets.

intro.speaker: player
intro.text: There are three of you, and one of me.

intro.speaker: antagonist
intro.text: Yeah, and we brought a knife.

partial.speaker: player
partial.text: Just take what you need and let me go.

win.speaker: player
win.text: I'm not looking for trouble. But I ain't backing down.

fail.speaker: antagonist
fail.text: Shut your mouth and put 'em up!

intro.speaker: antagonist
intro.text: It all comes down to this. Nothing left to say.

partial.speaker: player
partial.text: We don't have to do this. We used to be friends.

fail.speaker: antagonist
fail.text: Silence. I knew you'd never change.

conditional_fail.speaker: antagonist
conditional_fail.text: I can see the fear in your eyes.

timeout.speaker: antagonist
timeout.text: No words? Then let our fists do the talking.

intro.speaker: antagonist
intro.text: End of the line. The Syndicate sends their regards.

partial.speaker: player
partial.text: We can both walk away from this.

win.speaker: player
win.text: Tell your boss I'm coming for him.

fail.speaker: antagonist
fail.text: Train's leaving... and you're not on it.

timeout.speaker: antagonist
timeout.text: Too scared to fight? We'll make it quick.

intro.speaker: antagonist
intro.text: So you're the one tearing apart my city.

intro.speaker: player
intro.text: I'm the one burning it down.

intro.speaker: antagonist
intro.text: Let's see if you can take the heat.

partial.speaker: player
partial.text: You fought well... but it's over.

win.speaker: player
win.text: The city belongs to the people now.

fail.speaker: antagonist
fail.text: Another rat caught in the trap.
